# Pull Request Template

## Description
<!-- Provide a brief summary of the changes and the problem they solve. -->

## Related OpenSpec Change
- **Change Name**: <!-- e.g., core-engine-foundation -->
- **Task List**: [Tasks.md](link-to-tasks-file)

## Type of Change
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] Refactor (non-breaking change which improves code quality)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Quality Check
- [ ] I have run `npm test` locally and all tests pass.
- [ ] I have verified 80%+ test coverage.
- [ ] I have followed the TSDoc "Intent/Guarantee" pattern for all exports.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code.

## Peer Review Required
- [ ] AI Reviewer (Devin/Copilot)
- [ ] Human Reviewer (@LoFi-Monk)

---
*By submitting this PR, I confirm that all conversations must be resolved before merging.*
